# Creator Space Fort Wayne — Full Documentation

> Fort Wayne, Indiana's creative community directory and networking platform.

## Overview

Creator Space Fort Wayne (creatorspacefw.com) is a free community directory connecting creative professionals in Fort Wayne, Indiana. The platform serves as both a searchable database of local talent and a hub for monthly creator meetups.

## Platform Features

### Creator Directory
- Searchable database of Fort Wayne creatives
- Filter by skill category: Video, Photo, Editor, VFX, Code, Music, Aerial, Design, Writing, Audio Engineering, Animation, Marketing, Business
- Each creator has a public profile with bio, skills, portfolio, social links, and projects
- Direct profile URLs: https://creatorspacefw.com/directory/{creator-slug}

### Creator Profiles
- Avatar and personal branding
- Skills and expertise tags
- Bio and professional description
- Portfolio projects with images and YouTube embeds
- Social media links (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.)
- Website link
- Company and job title
- Community badges (Founding Member, Verified, etc.)
- Connect button for networking requests
- Shareable profile links

### Community Features
- Free monthly meetups for all creators
- Connection requests between creators
- Community announcements via email
- Profile sharing to social media

## Location

Fort Wayne is the second-largest city in Indiana with a growing creative economy. Creator Space FW serves the greater Fort Wayne metropolitan area including Allen County.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is Creator Space Fort Wayne free?**
A: Yes, completely free to join and use.

**Q: Do I need to be a professional to join?**
A: No. The community welcomes creators at all levels — hobbyists, students, freelancers, and professionals.

**Q: What types of creators are in the directory?**
A: Videographers, photographers, editors, VFX artists, developers, musicians, drone operators, graphic designers, writers, audio engineers, animators, marketers, and business professionals.

**Q: How do I find a creator for my project?**
A: Visit https://creatorspacefw.com/directory and use the search bar or skill filters to find the right person.

**Q: How do I join the directory?**
A: Sign up at https://creatorspacefw.com/auth/signup and complete your profile.

**Q: Where are the meetups held?**
A: Meetup locations vary. Check the website for upcoming event details.

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript
- Hosted on Vercel
- Database powered by Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Transactional email via Resend
